fields.title: tsconfig + agents: strict baseline (noImplicitAny etc)
fields.description:
Implement baseline strict TS config for `extensions/tau` and codify rules in `AGENTS.md`.

Changes:
- Add `extensions/tau/tsconfig.json` with strict options (noEmit).
- Update `AGENTS.md` with non-negotiable policy: no `any`.
- Keep unused locals/params non-fatal (warnings via lint; do not enable tsc unused-as-error gating).

DoD:
- `extensions/tau/tsconfig.json` exists and is strict.
- `AGENTS.md` includes tau hardening rules.
- No behavior changes.
fields.close_reason: Added strict extensions/tau tsconfig baseline and documented no-any policy in AGENTS.md
